title: Insomnious Lands
description: This mod adds items for storytelling (not specific story, but you can create your own with presented items). More to be added soon.
body:
This mod can be utilized for storytelling in different ways, like using items for roleplaying. The mod adds a variety of items, music discs for Minecraft albums (Lena Raine, C418, etc.), some blocks and new armor set (to be added).

What is added what will be: 
- 34 items for storytelling (15/34 added)
- Music discs (6 added for now)
- New ore and armor set (to be added)
- Some blocks (OP and error block)

Note that this mod is in alpha development, any bugs can be encountered. If they will, please DM me on Discord: @liuiscyberior.
